name: pi-web-toolkit
description_en: Web research toolkit for the pi coding agent. Search via SearXNG, fetch pages with scrapling, browse interactively via agent-browser, batch-read sources in parallel, and optionally fall back to Firecrawl Keyless (no API key) when a local backend fails.
description_zh: pi 编码代理的网络研究工具。通过 SearXNG 搜索，使用 scrapling 获取页面，通过 agent-browser 交互浏览，并行批量读取源，并在本地后端失败时可选回退到 Firecrawl Keyless（无需 API 密钥）
